description: Universal bull+VIX regime gate across all 5 pairs. Tiered thresholds: JPY/cross VIX>15, USD macro VIX>20.
finding: Bull+VIX elevation is a universal structural failure mode for macro rate-differential signals across all pairs. Fear flows compete with rate signals. Tiered thresholds by pair sensitivity (JPY/cross more reactive, USD pairs more resilient). All pairs now above Sharpe 1.5 individually.
